problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
